column1: # QCXIS Sdn Bhd — Monthly Cost & Revenue Forecast (2026–2031)
# All amounts in Malaysian Ringgit (RM)  |  USD/MYR = 4.40 fixed
# Scenarios: Conservative | Optimum | Aggressive  (see parameter table below)
# Rev_FeeCollection   : RM1 x estimated active clients/month; starts Jun-2026
# Rev_HR_Module       : SaaS sub — RM90/mo promo (2027-28), RM165/mo normal (2029+); 15% churn
# Rev_Portrait_Module : Psychometric seats — Starter RM299 | Pro RM699 | Enterprise RM1,199; 30% HR bundle; 10% churn
# Cost_Infra_ManagementFee : Flat RM3,000/mo paid to QC Group; covers DC hosting, AWS S3, Cloudflare,
#                            server room (utilities + debt repayment), cPanel, AV, SSL, monitoring, backup, domains
# Cost_Mgmt_*              : Payroll CTC = (base + RM450 allowances) x 1.1495 + RM150 insurance
#   IT New Hire (hired Jun-27): RM2,000 -> +5%/yr from 2029
# Cost_Mgmt_CorporateOneoffs: Trademark RM3,500 (Oct-26) | GPU R&D RM5,000 (Jun-27) | MDEC RM1,080 (Jun-28)
# Cost_Mgmt_Contingency    : 5% of (Payroll + Mgmt Fee + Corporate one-offs) per month
